summary: Iteration 15 - Access Request Workflow testing complete. All backend API endpoints for the new workflow (approve, assign, resolve, reject, delete) work correctly. 16/16 new workflow tests pass. Frontend tests pass when run individually but rate limiting affects sequential test runs.

notes: Rate limiting on login endpoint (60s cooldown) affects running multiple sequential frontend tests. Each Playwright test creates a new browser context requiring fresh login, hitting rate limits. Individual tests pass when run after rate limit resets.

backend_test_results.note: 1 flaky test (news pagination) fixed - RSS feed totals can change dynamically

features_verified.inquiries_list_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/inquiries returns paginated list of inquiries
features_verified.admins_list_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/inquiries/admins/list returns admin users for assignment
features_verified.approve_creates_user: PASS - POST /api/inquiries/{id}/approve creates user with role/organization
features_verified.approve_rejects_duplicate: PASS - Cannot approve already approved request
features_verified.approve_validates_role: PASS - Validates role parameter (trainee, org_admin, media_manager, super_admin)
features_verified.assign_to_admin: PASS - POST /api/inquiries/{id}/assign assigns request to admin and sends notification
features_verified.resolve_marks_resolved: PASS - POST /api/inquiries/{id}/resolve marks request as resolved
features_verified.create_inquiry_public: PASS - POST /api/inquiries creates inquiry without auth
features_verified.create_inquiry_validates_email: PASS - Validates email format on creation
features_verified.form_submissions_tabs: PASS - FormSubmissions page shows Contact Forms and Access Requests tabs (Access Requests active by default)

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/inquiries/admins/list - Get admins for assignment dropdown
passed_tests: Frontend: CMS Tiles input handling - PASS
Frontend: Form Submissions tabs - PASS (Access Requests active by default)
action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to FormSubmissions action buttons for more robust e2e testing
Rate limiting on login endpoint (60s cooldown) affects automated frontend testing with multiple sequential tests
seed_data_creation: Test inquiries created and cleaned up automatically by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Access Request Workflow fully tested. All backend API endpoints work correctly: approve creates user with temp password and optional welcome email, assign sends notification to admin, resolve marks complete, reject updates status. Frontend FormSubmissions page shows action buttons based on request status. Rate limiting (60s) on login endpoint - consider running fewer frontend tests per iteration or using API-based auth for tests.
